# Security Policy

## Reporting a Vulnerability

If you discover a security vulnerability, please report it responsibly:
- Email: contact@bespea.com
- Do not disclose publicly until a fix is coordinated.
- We will acknowledge receipt within 3 business days and coordinate a fix or mitigation.

## Supported Versions
- Only the latest release is supported for security updates.

## Responsible Disclosure
- We follow responsible disclosure best practices.
